ideation: This animation sequence depicts a gentle, upward reaching gesture, representing the hopeful wishing associated with the Tanabata festival.  The arms move gracefully, mimicking the upward growth of a wish-making tree.  The movement is slow and deliberate, emphasizing the contemplative nature of making a wish. The left arm will start lower than the right to add a bit of natural asymmetry.  Both arms will end in a similar position, but with a slight difference in height to avoid perfect symmetry.  The wrists will remain neutral throughout, focusing the expressiveness on the arm movements themselves.

frames.beat: arms hang loosely, ready to reach
both arms begin a slow, hopeful ascent
arms reach higher, stretching towards the stars
arms hold the wish, suspended in hopeful anticipation
